test_cases.name: MFA and Encryption - Full and Partial Match

trust_center_controls.text: Administrative accounts must use multi-factor authentication.
Customer data is encrypted at rest with AES-256.

document_controls.text: Remote access requires a second authentication factor.

base_controls.text: Multi-factor authentication is required for privileged and remote access.
Sensitive customer data is encrypted at rest and in transit.

mappings.rationale: TC-1 covers admin MFA and DOC-1 covers remote access MFA together fully satisfying NCC-1.

source_controls.text: Administrative accounts must use multi-factor authentication.
Remote access requires a second authentication factor.

base_controls.text: Multi-factor authentication is required for privileged and remote access.

mappings.rationale: TC-2 only covers encryption at rest; NCC-2 also requires encryption in transit.

source_controls.text: Customer data is encrypted at rest with AES-256.

base_controls.text: Sensitive customer data is encrypted at rest and in transit.

trust_center_controls.text: All access to production systems is logged and monitored.
Security events are retained for 12 months.
We maintain a 24/7 security operations team that responds to incidents.

document_controls.text: An incident response policy and procedures are documented and reviewed annually.
Audit logs are protected against tampering using WORM storage.

base_controls.text: Security-relevant events are logged and retained for at least 90 days.
Logs are protected from unauthorized modification or deletion.
A formal incident response plan is documented and tested annually.
Security incidents are investigated, contained, and documented.

mappings.rationale: TC-1 covers logging and TC-2 confirms 12-month retention, exceeding the 90-day requirement.

source_controls.text: All access to production systems is logged and monitored.
Security events are retained for 12 months.

base_controls.text: Security-relevant events are logged and retained for at least 90 days.

mappings.rationale: WORM storage satisfies the tamper-protection requirement for logs.

source_controls.text: Audit logs are protected against tampering using WORM storage.

base_controls.text: Logs are protected from unauthorized modification or deletion.

mappings.rationale: DOC-1 directly matches NCC-10 with documented, annually reviewed IR policy.

source_controls.text: An incident response policy and procedures are documented and reviewed annually.

base_controls.text: A formal incident response plan is documented and tested annually.

mappings.rationale: TC-3 confirms 24/7 response capability but does not explicitly state incidents are documented.

source_controls.text: We maintain a 24/7 security operations team that responds to incidents.

base_controls.text: Security incidents are investigated, contained, and documented.
